creator: byrnejb@harte-lyne.ca
text: There are no third party packages on this this system.  I installed linux_base-c7-7.9.2009 in an effort to satisfy the ld-linux.so.2 error but this had no effect.  I have some locally built packages for ports whose pkg options do not meet my needs, but these are all built from the official ports tree using poudriere and nothing besides the options are changed.
